features: Hair smells as good as it feels
description: Product Description The Alberto Balsam Coconut & Lychee Shampoo (Pack of 6 x 350ml) is enriched with exotic coconut and lychee extracts to provide a deep yet gentle cleanse, leaving hair feeling soft, fresh, and beautifully scented. Its lightweight and hydrating formula removes dirt and build-up without stripping away essential moisture, making it perfect for daily use. With its tropical, long-lasting fragrance, this shampoo delivers a refreshing experience while keeping your hair healthy and nourished. This great-value 6-pack ensures you always have a salon-quality shampoo at home for the whole family! Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Litchi Chinensis Fruit Extract, Cocamide MEA, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Panthenol, Parfum, Glycol Distearate, Polyquaternium-10, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Disodium EDTA, Pantolactone, PPG-6, Sodium Hydroxide, Benzyl Alcohol, Coumarin, Limonene, Linalool Directions Apply shampoo to wet hair, lather, rinse, and repeat if necessary. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral, CH63 3JW, UK. See more

specifications_table.Benefits: Nourishing and delightfully scented with natural ingredients
